recommendations.title: Big Nothing
recommendations.overview: A frustrated, unemployed teacher joins forces with a scammer and his girlfriend in a blackmailing scheme.

recommendations.title: Sexual Chronicles of a French Family
recommendations.overview: Three generations of a French family open up about their sexual experiences and desires after young Romain is caught masturbating in his biology class.

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.

recommendations.title: The Horseman on the Roof
recommendations.overview: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

recommendations.title: White Wedding
recommendations.overview: A philosophy professor has an illicit affair with one of his students, a bright yet troubled girl who lives alone.

recommendations.title: Vivre Sa Vie
recommendations.overview: Twelve episodic tales in the life of a Parisian woman and her slow descent into prostitution.

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: A Woman Is a Woman
recommendations.overview: Longing for a baby, a stripper pursues another man in order to make her boyfriend jealous.

recommendations.title: Betty Blue
recommendations.overview: A lackadaisical handyman and aspiring novelist tries to support his younger girlfriend as she slowly succumbs to madness.

recommendations.title: A Cat in Paris
recommendations.overview: A thrilling mystery that unfurls in the alleys and on the rooftops of the French capital, Paris, over the course of one adventurous evening.
